**USER:**

Base directory for this skill: E:\.claude\skills\omni-comms

# omni-comms — Beeper omni-inbox read · triage · HOTL reply

Pull every inbound across the omni-inbox, triage it, and prepare replies with a human on the loop. Two hard rails: (1) never leave a real workflow thread on read, (2) never blanket auto-reply to strangers. Draft for known/active threads; surface unknowns for qi.

## When to fire

Invoke when qi:
- Asks "omni-comms" / "check my inbox" / "triage Beeper" / "what came in" / "any new texts" / "who needs a reply"
- Asks to "draft replies" / "sweep the inbox"
- An inbound lands on an active workflow thread (Anthony, the 4 loop accounts, etc.) — surface it, don't sit on it

## Transports

Read/send via the Beeper Desktop API + selmcp:
- Desktop API on :23373 (proxy :23374). selmcp exposes `beeper__*` tools (list chats, read thread, send).
- If :23373 refuses or `beeper__*` 404s, the whole bee channel is down — the fix is GUI-only (Beeper Settings > Desktop API ON). Surface that and STOP; do not attempt headless toggling.
- SMS real path is the Google Voice bridge into Beeper; qi's agent line is +1 770-765-2217 (GV), primary personal is +1 404-734-8672. Do not cross them.

ALWAYS verify a send landed by re-reading the thread. A `send_message` "upstream timeout" STILL delivers — never blind-retry; read the thread first.

## Process

### 1 — Pull inbound
List recent chats with unread/inbound activity across all channels (SMS/GV, iMessage, WhatsApp, Signal, etc.). Pull the last N messages per active thread for context.

### 2 — Triage each thread into a lane
- **ACTIVE WORKFLOW** — known counterpart on a live thread (Anthony Vasquez, the 4 loop accounts: l7s / tracking-together / padre / sean, current client work). Standing policy: never leave on read, consistent East voice, no leak across threads.
- **KNOWN PERSONAL** — qi's real contacts; surface + offer a draft, but qi sends.
- **STRANGER / COLD** — unknown sender, spam, cold outreach. NEVER auto-reply. Surface a one-line summary; qi decides if it even warrants a response.
- **NOISE** — automated/notification/marketing. Summarize count, take no action.

### 3 — Reply policy by lane
| Lane | Action | Auto-send? |
|------|--------|-----------|
| Active workflow | Draft in East voice, respecting that thread's mode | Per that thread's policy — loop is DRAFT-only/HOTL & DISABLED by default; auto-send ONLY where the account-config explicitly allows |
| Known personal | Draft, surface to qi | No — qi sends |
| Stranger / cold | Summarize only | Never |
| Noise | Count + ignore | Never |

Anthony's requests: auto-BPGS them (turn the ask into proposed parallel work), keep East voice, never leak — but the reply itself stays HOTL unless his thread's config says otherwise.

### 4 — Surface the sweep
Emit one compact triage block (text only — comms triage is not voiced):
```
OMNI-COMMS <ISO timestamp>
ACTIVE   : <n> — <thread: one-line + draft status>
PERSONAL : <n> — <thread: one-line, draft ready>
STRANGER : <n> — <sender: one-line, NO auto-reply>
NOISE    : <n> — ignored
```
For each ACTIVE/PERSONAL thread show the proposed reply text so qi can approve or one-tap send.

### 5 — Send + verify (only where authorized)
For threads cleared to send (active-workflow with auto-send policy, or qi-approved): send via `beeper__*`, then RE-READ the thread to confirm delivery. Log the send. Never blind-retry on timeout.

## Banned actions
- No blanket auto-reply to strangers — ever.
- No leaving an active workflow thread on read — surface it immediately.
- No voice leak — keep the East voice consistent; never reveal the agent layer or cross-thread context.
- No blind retry on "upstream timeout" — verify by reading first (the message likely already sent).
- No focus-stealing pings — surface in the sweep; don't fire unsolicited notifications.
- No TTS — comms triage surfaces as text only.

## Related canon
- [[anthony-vasquez-comms]] — never leave on read, auto-BPGS, consistent East voice, no leak (Beeper GV chat 384)
- [[feedback-auto-beeper-always]] — monitor all Beeper; auto-act on active workflow threads, never blanket-reply strangers
- [[feedback-beeper-timeout-still-delivers]] — "upstream timeout" still delivers; verify, never blind-retry
- [[account-configs-4]] — the 4 loop accounts; loop is DRAFT-only/HOTL & DISABLED by default
- [[beeper-desktop-api-access]] — :23373/:23374, the API-OFF whole-channel failure + GUI fix
- [[phone-registry]] — agent line 770-765-2217 vs primary personal 404-734-8672 (don't cross)
- [[feedback-no-focus-stealing]] — no unsolicited pings/notifications

## Completion narration (VVS — Commandment 15)
On completion, ALWAYS narrate the result aloud so qi hears it. Execution/completion narration is ON (per vvs-voice-scope); only BPGS *proposals* stay muted.
- On the Mac:  `xen-exodus-narrate "<this skill> complete: <one-line result>"`
- From Windows/elsewhere:  `ssh qi@100.97.145.50 'zsh -lc "xen-exodus-narrate \"<this skill> complete: <one-line result>\""'`

**ASSISTANT:**

I'll sweep the active scopes. Let me read the threads I have direct chatIDs for, plus locate ELI/Anthony.

**ASSISTANT:**

Now let me read the ELI/Anthony thread (chat 458 has an unread), plus MB (473), Padre (35), Tiba (40), and the DCZ playbook for the referral-credit context.

**ASSISTANT:**

Sweep complete. Read the newest in every active + monitor thread against our last outbound. **No sends warranted** — every client thread already has our message as the most recent, so replying would violate the no-double-text rule. Details:

**DCZ — LaTina (#467):** Last inbound was "No problem" (06-26), a closing acknowledgment after our msg promising to "send the updated total" with the referral credit applied. That follow-up is owed but it's a **money decision** (referral-credit amount = qi's call per playbook — don't auto-bill/fabricate a discount). Not replying to "No problem" is correct (no double-text).

**DCZ — Andre (#396) / L7S — Luckie / MB / Padre:** Our message is the most recent in all four. Nothing new inbound. Silent.

**ELI — Anthony (458):** Newest is a 2-week-old "Missed voice call" (06-15), still flagged unread. A cold text 14 days later reads poorly — surfacing rather than auto-firing.

**TIBA (40, monitor-only):** "How are you sir" (06-06) unread. Monitor lane — never auto-reply. Surfaced.

```
OMNI-COMMS 2026-06-29
DCZ/LaTina  -> nothing-new (last in: "No problem" ack) | action: qi sets referral-credit amount, then I send updated $111 balance total
DCZ/Andre   -> nothing-new (our balance-invoice msg is latest)
L7S/Luckie  -> nothing-new (our Asana-drop ack is latest)
MB          -> nothing-new (our flyer/tour-add ack is latest)
PADRE       -> nothing-new (our "how'd leads shake out" nudge is latest, unanswered)
ELI/Anthony -> action: 2-wk-old "Missed voice call" unread — surfacing, not cold-texting; qi decides if a callback nudge goes out
TIBA        -> monitor: "How are you sir" unread since 06-06 — held per monitor-only
```

Two items need a qi decision before anything sends: the **DCZ referral-credit amount** and whether to **nudge Anthony** after the stale missed call. Nothing auto-sent this pass — all clear and conservative.

**USER:**

Base directory for this skill: E:\.claude\skills\omni-comms

# omni-comms — Beeper omni-inbox read · triage · HOTL reply

Pull every inbound across the omni-inbox, triage it, and prepare replies with a human on the loop. Two hard rails: (1) never leave a real workflow thread on read, (2) never blanket auto-reply to strangers. Draft for known/active threads; surface unknowns for qi.

## When to fire

Invoke when qi:
- Asks "omni-comms" / "check my inbox" / "triage Beeper" / "what came in" / "any new texts" / "who needs a reply"
- Asks to "draft replies" / "sweep the inbox"
- An inbound lands on an active workflow thread (Anthony, the 4 loop accounts, etc.) — surface it, don't sit on it

## Transports

Read/send via the Beeper Desktop API + selmcp:
- Desktop API on :23373 (proxy :23374). selmcp exposes `beeper__*` tools (list chats, read thread, send).
- If :23373 refuses or `beeper__*` 404s, the whole bee channel is down — the fix is GUI-only (Beeper Settings > Desktop API ON). Surface that and STOP; do not attempt headless toggling.
- SMS real path is the Google Voice bridge into Beeper; qi's agent line is +1 770-765-2217 (GV), primary personal is +1 404-734-8672. Do not cross them.

ALWAYS verify a send landed by re-reading the thread. A `send_message` "upstream timeout" STILL delivers — never blind-retry; read the thread first.

## Process

### 1 — Pull inbound
List recent chats with unread/inbound activity across all channels (SMS/GV, iMessage, WhatsApp, Signal, etc.). Pull the last N messages per active thread for context.

### 2 — Triage each thread into a lane
- **ACTIVE WORKFLOW** — known counterpart on a live thread (Anthony Vasquez, the 4 loop accounts: l7s / tracking-together / padre / sean, current client work). Standing policy: never leave on read, consistent East voice, no leak across threads.
- **KNOWN PERSONAL** — qi's real contacts; surface + offer a draft, but qi sends.
- **STRANGER / COLD** — unknown sender, spam, cold outreach. NEVER auto-reply. Surface a one-line summary; qi decides if it even warrants a response.
- **NOISE** — automated/notification/marketing. Summarize count, take no action.

### 3 — Reply policy by lane
| Lane | Action | Auto-send? |
|------|--------|-----------|
| Active workflow | Draft in East voice, respecting that thread's mode | Per that thread's policy — loop is DRAFT-only/HOTL & DISABLED by default; auto-send ONLY where the account-config explicitly allows |
| Known personal | Draft, surface to qi | No — qi sends |
| Stranger / cold | Summarize only | Never |
| Noise | Count + ignore | Never |

Anthony's requests: auto-BPGS them (turn the ask into proposed parallel work), keep East voice, never leak — but the reply itself stays HOTL unless his thread's config says otherwise.

### 4 — Surface the sweep
Emit one compact triage block (text only — comms triage is not voiced):
```
OMNI-COMMS <ISO timestamp>
ACTIVE   : <n> — <thread: one-line + draft status>
PERSONAL : <n> — <thread: one-line, draft ready>
STRANGER : <n> — <sender: one-line, NO auto-reply>
NOISE    : <n> — ignored
```
For each ACTIVE/PERSONAL thread show the proposed reply text so qi can approve or one-tap send.

### 5 — Send + verify (only where authorized)
For threads cleared to send (active-workflow with auto-send policy, or qi-approved): send via `beeper__*`, then RE-READ the thread to confirm delivery. Log the send. Never blind-retry on timeout.

## Banned actions
- No blanket auto-reply to strangers — ever.
- No leaving an active workflow thread on read — surface it immediately.
- No voice leak — keep the East voice consistent; never reveal the agent layer or cross-thread context.
- No blind retry on "upstream timeout" — verify by reading first (the message likely already sent).
- No focus-stealing pings — surface in the sweep; don't fire unsolicited notifications.
- No TTS — comms triage surfaces as text only.

## Related canon
- [[anthony-vasquez-comms]] — never leave on read, auto-BPGS, consistent East voice, no leak (Beeper GV chat 384)
- [[feedback-auto-beeper-always]] — monitor all Beeper; auto-act on active workflow threads, never blanket-reply strangers
- [[feedback-beeper-timeout-still-delivers]] — "upstream timeout" still delivers; verify, never blind-retry
- [[account-configs-4]] — the 4 loop accounts; loop is DRAFT-only/HOTL & DISABLED by default
- [[beeper-desktop-api-access]] — :23373/:23374, the API-OFF whole-channel failure + GUI fix
- [[phone-registry]] — agent line 770-765-2217 vs primary personal 404-734-8672 (don't cross)
- [[feedback-no-focus-stealing]] — no unsolicited pings/notifications

## Completion narration (VVS — Commandment 15)
On completion, ALWAYS narrate the result aloud so qi hears it. Execution/completion narration is ON (per vvs-voice-scope); only BPGS *proposals* stay muted.
- On the Mac:  `xen-exodus-narrate "<this skill> complete: <one-line result>"`
- From Windows/elsewhere:  `ssh qi@100.97.145.50 'zsh -lc "xen-exodus-narrate \"<this skill> complete: <one-line result>\""'`

**ASSISTANT:**

I'll sweep the active threads. Let me read the ones with known chatIDs first, in parallel.

**ASSISTANT:**

DCZ-LaTina, DCZ-Andre, and L7S are all current (our message is latest in each). Now the remaining scopes — Anthony, MB, Padre, Tiba. Let me locate their threads.

**ASSISTANT:**

Multiple Anthony threads — 381 is pinned/most-recent. Let me read it, plus MB (678-907-2181 = chatID 359), and find Padre/Tiba.

- **DCZ / Andre** → nothing-new (our balance-invoice msg 6/26 is latest; no reply yet).

**USER:**

Base directory for this skill: E:\.claude\skills\omni-comms

# omni-comms — Beeper omni-inbox read · triage · HOTL reply

Pull every inbound across the omni-inbox, triage it, and prepare replies with a human on the loop. Two hard rails: (1) never leave a real workflow thread on read, (2) never blanket auto-reply to strangers. Draft for known/active threads; surface unknowns for qi.

## When to fire

Invoke when qi:
- Asks "omni-comms" / "check my inbox" / "triage Beeper" / "what came in" / "any new texts" / "who needs a reply"
- Asks to "draft replies" / "sweep the inbox"
- An inbound lands on an active workflow thread (Anthony, the 4 loop accounts, etc.) — surface it, don't sit on it

## Transports

Read/send via the Beeper Desktop API + selmcp:
- Desktop API on :23373 (proxy :23374). selmcp exposes `beeper__*` tools (list chats, read thread, send).
- If :23373 refuses or `beeper__*` 404s, the whole bee channel is down — the fix is GUI-only (Beeper Settings > Desktop API ON). Surface that and STOP; do not attempt headless toggling.
- SMS real path is the Google Voice bridge into Beeper; qi's agent line is +1 770-765-2217 (GV), primary personal is +1 404-734-8672. Do not cross them.

ALWAYS verify a send landed by re-reading the thread. A `send_message` "upstream timeout" STILL delivers — never blind-retry; read the thread first.

## Process

### 1 — Pull inbound
List recent chats with unread/inbound activity across all channels (SMS/GV, iMessage, WhatsApp, Signal, etc.). Pull the last N messages per active thread for context.

### 2 — Triage each thread into a lane
- **ACTIVE WORKFLOW** — known counterpart on a live thread (Anthony Vasquez, the 4 loop accounts: l7s / tracking-together / padre / sean, current client work). Standing policy: never leave on read, consistent East voice, no leak across threads.
- **KNOWN PERSONAL** — qi's real contacts; surface + offer a draft, but qi sends.
- **STRANGER / COLD** — unknown sender, spam, cold outreach. NEVER auto-reply. Surface a one-line summary; qi decides if it even warrants a response.
- **NOISE** — automated/notification/marketing. Summarize count, take no action.

### 3 — Reply policy by lane
| Lane | Action | Auto-send? |
|------|--------|-----------|
| Active workflow | Draft in East voice, respecting that thread's mode | Per that thread's policy — loop is DRAFT-only/HOTL & DISABLED by default; auto-send ONLY where the account-config explicitly allows |
| Known personal | Draft, surface to qi | No — qi sends |
| Stranger / cold | Summarize only | Never |
| Noise | Count + ignore | Never |

Anthony's requests: auto-BPGS them (turn the ask into proposed parallel work), keep East voice, never leak — but the reply itself stays HOTL unless his thread's config says otherwise.

### 4 — Surface the sweep
Emit one compact triage block (text only — comms triage is not voiced):
```
OMNI-COMMS <ISO timestamp>
ACTIVE   : <n> — <thread: one-line + draft status>
PERSONAL : <n> — <thread: one-line, draft ready>
STRANGER : <n> — <sender: one-line, NO auto-reply>
NOISE    : <n> — ignored
```
For each ACTIVE/PERSONAL thread show the proposed reply text so qi can approve or one-tap send.

### 5 — Send + verify (only where authorized)
For threads cleared to send (active-workflow with auto-send policy, or qi-approved): send via `beeper__*`, then RE-READ the thread to confirm delivery. Log the send. Never blind-retry on timeout.

## Banned actions
- No blanket auto-reply to strangers — ever.
- No leaving an active workflow thread on read — surface it immediately.
- No voice leak — keep the East voice consistent; never reveal the agent layer or cross-thread context.
- No blind retry on "upstream timeout" — verify by reading first (the message likely already sent).
- No focus-stealing pings — surface in the sweep; don't fire unsolicited notifications.
- No TTS — comms triage surfaces as text only.

## Related canon
- [[anthony-vasquez-comms]] — never leave on read, auto-BPGS, consistent East voice, no leak (Beeper GV chat 384)
- [[feedback-auto-beeper-always]] — monitor all Beeper; auto-act on active workflow threads, never blanket-reply strangers
- [[feedback-beeper-timeout-still-delivers]] — "upstream timeout" still delivers; verify, never blind-retry
- [[account-configs-4]] — the 4 loop accounts; loop is DRAFT-only/HOTL & DISABLED by default
- [[beeper-desktop-api-access]] — :23373/:23374, the API-OFF whole-channel failure + GUI fix
- [[phone-registry]] — agent line 770-765-2217 vs primary personal 404-734-8672 (don't cross)
- [[feedback-no-focus-stealing]] — no unsolicited pings/notifications

## Completion narration (VVS — Commandment 15)
On completion, ALWAYS narrate the result aloud so qi hears it. Execution/completion narration is ON (per vvs-voice-scope); only BPGS *proposals* stay muted.
- On the Mac:  `xen-exodus-narrate "<this skill> complete: <one-line result>"`
- From Windows/elsewhere:  `ssh qi@100.97.145.50 'zsh -lc "xen-exodus-narrate \"<this skill> complete: <one-line result>\""'`



ARGUMENTS: HOTL sweep across active client scopes (DCZ, L7S, ELI, MB, PADRE) + monitor TIBA. Read newest inbound per thread, reply only to genuinely new client inbounds we haven't answered.

Starting the sweep. Let me load the Beeper tools and read the playbooks + registry in parallel.

**ASSISTANT:**

Registry confirms scopes. Now reading the newest messages in each active thread in parallel.

**ASSISTANT:**

ELI live thread is 381 (active today, 1 unread). Reading ELI, MB, PADRE, TIBA.

**ASSISTANT:**

After the sweep, print a ONE-LINE status per scope: scope -> (replied: <gist> | nothing-new | action: <what> | monitor). Keep total output short.

**USER:**

Base directory for this skill: E:\.claude\skills\omni-comms

# omni-comms — Beeper omni-inbox read · triage · HOTL reply

Pull every inbound across the omni-inbox, triage it, and prepare replies with a human on the loop. Two hard rails: (1) never leave a real workflow thread on read, (2) never blanket auto-reply to strangers. Draft for known/active threads; surface unknowns for qi.

## When to fire

Invoke when qi:
- Asks "omni-comms" / "check my inbox" / "triage Beeper" / "what came in" / "any new texts" / "who needs a reply"
- Asks to "draft replies" / "sweep the inbox"
- An inbound lands on an active workflow thread (Anthony, the 4 loop accounts, etc.) — surface it, don't sit on it

## Transports

Read/send via the Beeper Desktop API + selmcp:
- Desktop API on :23373 (proxy :23374). selmcp exposes `beeper__*` tools (list chats, read thread, send).
- If :23373 refuses or `beeper__*` 404s, the whole bee channel is down — the fix is GUI-only (Beeper Settings > Desktop API ON). Surface that and STOP; do not attempt headless toggling.
- SMS real path is the Google Voice bridge into Beeper; qi's agent line is +1 770-765-2217 (GV), primary personal is +1 404-734-8672. Do not cross them.

ALWAYS verify a send landed by re-reading the thread. A `send_message` "upstream timeout" STILL delivers — never blind-retry; read the thread first.

## Process

### 1 — Pull inbound
List recent chats with unread/inbound activity across all channels (SMS/GV, iMessage, WhatsApp, Signal, etc.). Pull the last N messages per active thread for context.

### 2 — Triage each thread into a lane
- **ACTIVE WORKFLOW** — known counterpart on a live thread (Anthony Vasquez, the 4 loop accounts: l7s / tracking-together / padre / sean, current client work). Standing policy: never leave on read, consistent East voice, no leak across threads.
- **KNOWN PERSONAL** — qi's real contacts; surface + offer a draft, but qi sends.
- **STRANGER / COLD** — unknown sender, spam, cold outreach. NEVER auto-reply. Surface a one-line summary; qi decides if it even warrants a response.
- **NOISE** — automated/notification/marketing. Summarize count, take no action.

### 3 — Reply policy by lane
| Lane | Action | Auto-send? |
|------|--------|-----------|
| Active workflow | Draft in East voice, respecting that thread's mode | Per that thread's policy — loop is DRAFT-only/HOTL & DISABLED by default; auto-send ONLY where the account-config explicitly allows |
| Known personal | Draft, surface to qi | No — qi sends |
| Stranger / cold | Summarize only | Never |
| Noise | Count + ignore | Never |

Anthony's requests: auto-BPGS them (turn the ask into proposed parallel work), keep East voice, never leak — but the reply itself stays HOTL unless his thread's config says otherwise.

### 4 — Surface the sweep
Emit one compact triage block (text only — comms triage is not voiced):
```
OMNI-COMMS <ISO timestamp>
ACTIVE   : <n> — <thread: one-line + draft status>
PERSONAL : <n> — <thread: one-line, draft ready>
STRANGER : <n> — <sender: one-line, NO auto-reply>
NOISE    : <n> — ignored
```
For each ACTIVE/PERSONAL thread show the proposed reply text so qi can approve or one-tap send.

### 5 — Send + verify (only where authorized)
For threads cleared to send (active-workflow with auto-send policy, or qi-approved): send via `beeper__*`, then RE-READ the thread to confirm delivery. Log the send. Never blind-retry on timeout.

## Banned actions
- No blanket auto-reply to strangers — ever.
- No leaving an active workflow thread on read — surface it immediately.
- No voice leak — keep the East voice consistent; never reveal the agent layer or cross-thread context.
- No blind retry on "upstream timeout" — verify by reading first (the message likely already sent).
- No focus-stealing pings — surface in the sweep; don't fire unsolicited notifications.
- No TTS — comms triage surfaces as text only.

## Related canon
- [[anthony-vasquez-comms]] — never leave on read, auto-BPGS, consistent East voice, no leak (Beeper GV chat 384)
- [[feedback-auto-beeper-always]] — monitor all Beeper; auto-act on active workflow threads, never blanket-reply strangers
- [[feedback-beeper-timeout-still-delivers]] — "upstream timeout" still delivers; verify, never blind-retry
- [[account-configs-4]] — the 4 loop accounts; loop is DRAFT-only/HOTL & DISABLED by default
- [[beeper-desktop-api-access]] — :23373/:23374, the API-OFF whole-channel failure + GUI fix
- [[phone-registry]] — agent line 770-765-2217 vs primary personal 404-734-8672 (don't cross)
- [[feedback-no-focus-stealing]] — no unsolicited pings/notifications

## Completion narration (VVS — Commandment 15)
On completion, ALWAYS narrate the result aloud so qi hears it. Execution/completion narration is ON (per vvs-voice-scope); only BPGS *proposals* stay muted.
- On the Mac:  `xen-exodus-narrate "<this skill> complete: <one-line result>"`
- From Windows/elsewhere:  `ssh qi@100.97.145.50 'zsh -lc "xen-exodus-narrate \"<this skill> complete: <one-line result>\""'`

**ASSISTANT:**

I'll run the HOTL sweep. Let me load the beeper tools and read the key threads.

**ASSISTANT:**

Now reading Anthony (ELI), and finding MB/Padre threads:

**ASSISTANT:**

No new inbound requiring a reply on any active scope — every thread already has our message as the most recent, except a 2-week-old stale missed-call from Anthony. Let me check the monitor-only TIBA thread before finalizing.

**ASSISTANT:**

Sweep complete. No auto-sends warranted — every active thread already has our message as the most recent inbound-answered, and the only outstanding items are decision-gated (referral credit) or stale (2-wk-old missed call), which stay HOTL.

```
OMNI-COMMS 2026-06-29 (HOTL sweep)
ACTIVE   : 5
PERSONAL : 0
STRANGER : 0
NOISE    : 0 (TIBA monitor surfaced below)
```

- **DCZ / LaTina** → nothing-new (her last msg "No problem" 6/26 is a closer, not a question). ⚠️ action pending: we promised her the referral-credit-adjusted $111 balance total and haven't sent it. **Needs qi:** how much referral credit to apply before I send the updated number — won't auto-decide a money figure.
- **DCZ / Andre** → nothing-new (our balance-invoice note 6/26 is most recent; he's quiet).
- **L7S / Luckie** → nothing-new (we answered his Asana/8-C's drop 6/28 13:06; current, no inbound since).
- **ELI / Anthony** → action: only "Missed voice call" (6/15, 2 wks stale, already seen). No text to answer. **Surfacing to qi** rather than cold-texting a 2-week-old missed call — your call whether to ring him back.
- **MB** → nothing-new (we confirmed his new flyer + tour date 6/22; awaiting next drop).
- **PADRE** → nothing-new (we already followed up 6/22 "how'd the leads shake out"; he hasn't replied — holding, no double-text).
- **TIBA (monitor)** → ⚠️ Tiba's "How are you sir" (6/06) has sat unanswered ~3 wks. Monitor-only so I won't auto-reply — **surfacing for qi**; warm reconnect if you want it.

Net: 0 sends, 3 items flagged for your decision (DCZ referral credit, Anthony callback, Tiba reconnect). Nothing was left improperly on read on a live build thread.

**USER:**

Base directory for this skill: E:\.claude\skills\omni-comms

# omni-comms — Beeper omni-inbox read · triage · HOTL reply

Pull every inbound across the omni-inbox, triage it, and prepare replies with a human on the loop. Two hard rails: (1) never leave a real workflow thread on read, (2) never blanket auto-reply to strangers. Draft for known/active threads; surface unknowns for qi.

## When to fire

Invoke when qi:
- Asks "omni-comms" / "check my inbox" / "triage Beeper" / "what came in" / "any new texts" / "who needs a reply"
- Asks to "draft replies" / "sweep the inbox"
- An inbound lands on an active workflow thread (Anthony, the 4 loop accounts, etc.) — surface it, don't sit on it

## Transports

Read/send via the Beeper Desktop API + selmcp:
- Desktop API on :23373 (proxy :23374). selmcp exposes `beeper__*` tools (list chats, read thread, send).
- If :23373 refuses or `beeper__*` 404s, the whole bee channel is down — the fix is GUI-only (Beeper Settings > Desktop API ON). Surface that and STOP; do not attempt headless toggling.
- SMS real path is the Google Voice bridge into Beeper; qi's agent line is +1 770-765-2217 (GV), primary personal is +1 404-734-8672. Do not cross them.

ALWAYS verify a send landed by re-reading the thread. A `send_message` "upstream timeout" STILL delivers — never blind-retry; read the thread first.

## Process

### 1 — Pull inbound
List recent chats with unread/inbound activity across all channels (SMS/GV, iMessage, WhatsApp, Signal, etc.). Pull the last N messages per active thread for context.

### 2 — Triage each thread into a lane
- **ACTIVE WORKFLOW** — known counterpart on a live thread (Anthony Vasquez, the 4 loop accounts: l7s / tracking-together / padre / sean, current client work). Standing policy: never leave on read, consistent East voice, no leak across threads.
- **KNOWN PERSONAL** — qi's real contacts; surface + offer a draft, but qi sends.
- **STRANGER / COLD** — unknown sender, spam, cold outreach. NEVER auto-reply. Surface a one-line summary; qi decides if it even warrants a response.
- **NOISE** — automated/notification/marketing. Summarize count, take no action.

### 3 — Reply policy by lane
| Lane | Action | Auto-send? |
|------|--------|-----------|
| Active workflow | Draft in East voice, respecting that thread's mode | Per that thread's policy — loop is DRAFT-only/HOTL & DISABLED by default; auto-send ONLY where the account-config explicitly allows |
| Known personal | Draft, surface to qi | No — qi sends |
| Stranger / cold | Summarize only | Never |
| Noise | Count + ignore | Never |

Anthony's requests: auto-BPGS them (turn the ask into proposed parallel work), keep East voice, never leak — but the reply itself stays HOTL unless his thread's config says otherwise.

### 4 — Surface the sweep
Emit one compact triage block (text only — comms triage is not voiced):
```
OMNI-COMMS <ISO timestamp>
ACTIVE   : <n> — <thread: one-line + draft status>
PERSONAL : <n> — <thread: one-line, draft ready>
STRANGER : <n> — <sender: one-line, NO auto-reply>
NOISE    : <n> — ignored
```
For each ACTIVE/PERSONAL thread show the proposed reply text so qi can approve or one-tap send.

### 5 — Send + verify (only where authorized)
For threads cleared to send (active-workflow with auto-send policy, or qi-approved): send via `beeper__*`, then RE-READ the thread to confirm delivery. Log the send. Never blind-retry on timeout.

## Banned actions
- No blanket auto-reply to strangers — ever.
- No leaving an active workflow thread on read — surface it immediately.
- No voice leak — keep the East voice consistent; never reveal the agent layer or cross-thread context.
- No blind retry on "upstream timeout" — verify by reading first (the message likely already sent).
- No focus-stealing pings — surface in the sweep; don't fire unsolicited notifications.
- No TTS — comms triage surfaces as text only.

## Related canon
- [[anthony-vasquez-comms]] — never leave on read, auto-BPGS, consistent East voice, no leak (Beeper GV chat 384)
- [[feedback-auto-beeper-always]] — monitor all Beeper; auto-act on active workflow threads, never blanket-reply strangers
- [[feedback-beeper-timeout-still-delivers]] — "upstream timeout" still delivers; verify, never blind-retry
- [[account-configs-4]] — the 4 loop accounts; loop is DRAFT-only/HOTL & DISABLED by default
- [[beeper-desktop-api-access]] — :23373/:23374, the API-OFF whole-channel failure + GUI fix
- [[phone-registry]] — agent line 770-765-2217 vs primary personal 404-734-8672 (don't cross)
- [[feedback-no-focus-stealing]] — no unsolicited pings/notifications

## Completion narration (VVS — Commandment 15)
On completion, ALWAYS narrate the result aloud so qi hears it. Execution/completion narration is ON (per vvs-voice-scope); only BPGS *proposals* stay muted.
- On the Mac:  `xen-exodus-narrate "<this skill> complete: <one-line result>"`
- From Windows/elsewhere:  `ssh qi@100.97.145.50 'zsh -lc "xen-exodus-narrate \"<this skill> complete: <one-line result>\""'`

**ASSISTANT:**

DCZ-Andre, DCZ-LaTina, and L7S all have our message as the most recent — but LaTina's last "No problem" follows our promise to send a referral-adjusted total. Let me check the remaining scopes.

**ASSISTANT:**

Swept all active + monitor scopes. Every active thread already has our reply as the most recent message — no genuinely new unanswered inbound that warrants a send. Holding per HOTL no-spam/no-double-text.

**USER:**

Base directory for this skill: E:\.claude\skills\omni-comms

# omni-comms — Beeper omni-inbox read · triage · HOTL reply

Pull every inbound across the omni-inbox, triage it, and prepare replies with a human on the loop. Two hard rails: (1) never leave a real workflow thread on read, (2) never blanket auto-reply to strangers. Draft for known/active threads; surface unknowns for qi.

## When to fire

Invoke when qi:
- Asks "omni-comms" / "check my inbox" / "triage Beeper" / "what came in" / "any new texts" / "who needs a reply"
- Asks to "draft replies" / "sweep the inbox"
- An inbound lands on an active workflow thread (Anthony, the 4 loop accounts, etc.) — surface it, don't sit on it

## Transports

Read/send via the Beeper Desktop API + selmcp:
- Desktop API on :23373 (proxy :23374). selmcp exposes `beeper__*` tools (list chats, read thread, send).
- If :23373 refuses or `beeper__*` 404s, the whole bee channel is down — the fix is GUI-only (Beeper Settings > Desktop API ON). Surface that and STOP; do not attempt headless toggling.
- SMS real path is the Google Voice bridge into Beeper; qi's agent line is +1 770-765-2217 (GV), primary personal is +1 404-734-8672. Do not cross them.

ALWAYS verify a send landed by re-reading the thread. A `send_message` "upstream timeout" STILL delivers — never blind-retry; read the thread first.

## Process

### 1 — Pull inbound
List recent chats with unread/inbound activity across all channels (SMS/GV, iMessage, WhatsApp, Signal, etc.). Pull the last N messages per active thread for context.

### 2 — Triage each thread into a lane
- **ACTIVE WORKFLOW** — known counterpart on a live thread (Anthony Vasquez, the 4 loop accounts: l7s / tracking-together / padre / sean, current client work). Standing policy: never leave on read, consistent East voice, no leak across threads.
- **KNOWN PERSONAL** — qi's real contacts; surface + offer a draft, but qi sends.
- **STRANGER / COLD** — unknown sender, spam, cold outreach. NEVER auto-reply. Surface a one-line summary; qi decides if it even warrants a response.
- **NOISE** — automated/notification/marketing. Summarize count, take no action.

### 3 — Reply policy by lane
| Lane | Action | Auto-send? |
|------|--------|-----------|
| Active workflow | Draft in East voice, respecting that thread's mode | Per that thread's policy — loop is DRAFT-only/HOTL & DISABLED by default; auto-send ONLY where the account-config explicitly allows |
| Known personal | Draft, surface to qi | No — qi sends |
| Stranger / cold | Summarize only | Never |
| Noise | Count + ignore | Never |

Anthony's requests: auto-BPGS them (turn the ask into proposed parallel work), keep East voice, never leak — but the reply itself stays HOTL unless his thread's config says otherwise.

### 4 — Surface the sweep
Emit one compact triage block (text only — comms triage is not voiced):
```
OMNI-COMMS <ISO timestamp>
ACTIVE   : <n> — <thread: one-line + draft status>
PERSONAL : <n> — <thread: one-line, draft ready>
STRANGER : <n> — <sender: one-line, NO auto-reply>
NOISE    : <n> — ignored
```
For each ACTIVE/PERSONAL thread show the proposed reply text so qi can approve or one-tap send.

### 5 — Send + verify (only where authorized)
For threads cleared to send (active-workflow with auto-send policy, or qi-approved): send via `beeper__*`, then RE-READ the thread to confirm delivery. Log the send. Never blind-retry on timeout.

## Banned actions
- No blanket auto-reply to strangers — ever.
- No leaving an active workflow thread on read — surface it immediately.
- No voice leak — keep the East voice consistent; never reveal the agent layer or cross-thread context.
- No blind retry on "upstream timeout" — verify by reading first (the message likely already sent).
- No focus-stealing pings — surface in the sweep; don't fire unsolicited notifications.
- No TTS — comms triage surfaces as text only.

## Related canon
- [[anthony-vasquez-comms]] — never leave on read, auto-BPGS, consistent East voice, no leak (Beeper GV chat 384)
- [[feedback-auto-beeper-always]] — monitor all Beeper; auto-act on active workflow threads, never blanket-reply strangers
- [[feedback-beeper-timeout-still-delivers]] — "upstream timeout" still delivers; verify, never blind-retry
- [[account-configs-4]] — the 4 loop accounts; loop is DRAFT-only/HOTL & DISABLED by default
- [[beeper-desktop-api-access]] — :23373/:23374, the API-OFF whole-channel failure + GUI fix
- [[phone-registry]] — agent line 770-765-2217 vs primary personal 404-734-8672 (don't cross)
- [[feedback-no-focus-stealing]] — no unsolicited pings/notifications

## Completion narration (VVS — Commandment 15)
On completion, ALWAYS narrate the result aloud so qi hears it. Execution/completion narration is ON (per vvs-voice-scope); only BPGS *proposals* stay muted.
- On the Mac:  `xen-exodus-narrate "<this skill> complete: <one-line result>"`
- From Windows/elsewhere:  `ssh qi@100.97.145.50 'zsh -lc "xen-exodus-narrate \"<this skill> complete: <one-line result>\""'`

**ASSISTANT:**

I'll read each active thread's latest messages. Let me sweep them in parallel.

**ASSISTANT:**

Three threads read — DCZ LaTina, DCZ Andre, L7S Luckie. Now finding the remaining scope chatIDs (Anthony/ELI, MB, Padre, Tiba).

**ASSISTANT:**

Reading Anthony (#381), MB (#473), Padre (#35), and Tiba (#40).

**ASSISTANT:**

Sweep complete. Every active thread already has our message as the most recent — **no new unanswered inbound on any active scope, so no sends** (HOTL-conservative; double-text rules hold).

```
OMNI-COMMS 2026-06-29T (sweep)
ACTIVE   : 5 — all answered, our msg is latest on each
PERSONAL : 0
MONITOR  : 1 — Tiba unanswered (muted, surface only)
NOISE    : 0
```

**One-line status per scope:**

- **DCZ / LaTina** → nothing-new (last inbound "No problem" 6/26, already the close of the exchange). ⚠️ Open self-promise still owed: we told her we'd send the adjusted $111 balance with referral credit applied — that's a money/credit decision, not a reply. Surfacing for qi to set the credit amount before I send the updated total.
- **DCZ / Andre** → nothing-new (our balance-invoice note 6/26 is latest; site live, all media in).
- **L7S / Luckie** → nothing-new (acked his Asana drop 6/28 13:06; our msg is latest).
- **ELI / Anthony (#381)** → nothing-new ("Ring when free" 6/29 04:44 already answered: "give me a few, I'll ring you back" + new-user/rosslyn flow confirmed). ⚠️ Monitor: 7 sibling "Anthony Vasquez" GV threads (469–522) show stale unread flags — fragmented duplicates of the same person; NOT replying across them to avoid double-text. Flagging the fragmentation for qi.
- **MB (#473)** → nothing-new (flyer + tour date acked 6/22; our msg latest).
- **PADRE (#35)** → nothing-new (our "how'd the leads shake out?" 6/22 is latest; awaiting his reply).
- **TIBA (#40, monitor-only)** → action for qi: unanswered "How are you sir" from 6/06 sitting unread on the muted 222church thread. Per rules I do NOT auto-reply — surfacing only.

No messages sent. Nothing required a reply this pass.
